title: Momentrack
description: Real-time tracking solution for logistics and fleet management.
content:
## Overview

Momentrack provides GPS tracking and fleet management solutions for businesses.

## Challenge

They needed a real-time tracking dashboard that could handle thousands of vehicles and provide accurate location data.

## Solution

We developed a scalable web application with WebSocket integration for real-time updates and an intuitive map interface.

## Results

- Real-time tracking of 5000+ vehicles
- 99.9% uptime
- Advanced reporting and analytics
